description: This file defines the RecipeDetailsScreen widget for a Flutter app, displaying detailed information about a recipe including ingredients, steps, and related UI components.

classes.name: RecipeDetailsScreen
classes.description: A StatelessWidget that displays detailed information about a recipe, including title, ingredients, steps, and options for editing if the recipe is custom.

classes.name: _HeroCard
classes.description: A widget that displays a visual summary of the recipe, including category, total minutes, description, and tags.

classes.name: _SectionCard
classes.description: A reusable widget for displaying sections like Ingredients and Steps with a header and child content.

classes.name: _Bullet
classes.description: A widget for displaying a bullet point with associated text.

classes.name: _NumberedStep
classes.description: A widget for displaying a numbered step in the recipe steps list.

classes.name: _Pill
classes.description: A widget for displaying a small capsule with an icon and text, used for tags and labels.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for the RecipeDetailsScreen, displaying recipe details including ingredients and steps.

methods.name: _HeroCard.build
methods.description: Builds the visual summary card for the recipe, including category, duration, description, and tags.

methods.name: _SectionCard.build
methods.description: Builds a styled section container with a header and child content.

methods.name: _Bullet.build
methods.description: Builds a bullet point widget with a preceding dot.

methods.name: _NumberedStep.build
methods.description: Builds a widget displaying a numbered step with styling.

methods.name: _Pill.build
methods.description: Builds a small capsule widget with an icon and label.
